title: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor. Discover pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your business needs.
h1: Klaviyo vs Campaign Monitor: A Complete Comparison
intro: Klaviyo and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands with advanced automation and predictive analytics, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies and teams managing multiple client accounts. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing strategy and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: E-commerce brands on Shopify and WooCommerce
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple brands
Multi-brand management, beautiful templates, transactional email

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce business on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced automation
You want to start free with up to 500 subscribers before upgrading
You need SMS marketing capabilities alongside email
choose_b_if: You're an agency managing multiple client brands and campaigns
You prioritize beautiful, drag-and-drop email templates
You need transactional email functionality and prefer a straightforward pricing structure

faq.q: Is Klaviyo better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands requiring predictive analytics and SMS integration, earning higher ratings (4.6 vs 4.1 on G2). However, Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands and offers better value at lower price points, making it better for cost-conscious teams.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free tier, while Klaviyo offers a free plan for up to 500 subscribers. For small lists, Klaviyo's free tier is cheaper. Once you exceed 500 subscribers, Klaviyo's pricing ($45+/month) becomes comparable to Campaign Monitor, depending on your subscriber count and features needed.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is straightforward. Both platforms support subscriber list imports via CSV or API connections. You can export your contacts and email templates from Campaign Monitor and import them into Klaviyo. We recommend planning the migration during a low-traffic period and testing your automation workflows before fully transitioning.
